villain.name: Thomas Tuchel
villain.reason: Widely criticized for controversy. Mentioned in 4 posts, fueling massive outrage across US and Canada fan communities.
villain.topSlander: The worst performance seen in years — fans are calling for accountability.

tragicHero.name: Atlanta Stadium
tragicHero.story:
England avert disaster against DR Congo but they must be better in Mexico City | Jacob Steinberg

It was an almost Iceland in Atlanta but Thomas Tuchel will have to get it right from the start in the cauldron of Azteca

It was looking bleak...
